zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Evelyn於1472年1月10日出生在英國米德萊可哈洛 奧 馮 希爾時，他的父親William Evelyn33歲，母親Mrs William Evelyn23歲。他於1508年8月18日與Alice Aylward在英國英格蘭米德萊可斯坦莫結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1508年8月18日在英國素瑞金斯頓 武朋 坦斯享年36歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可哈洛 奧 馮 希爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Evelyn于1472年1月10日出生在英国米德萊可哈洛 奧 馮 希爾时，他的父亲William Evelyn33岁，母亲Mrs William Evelyn23岁。他于1508年8月18日与Alice Aylward在英国英格兰米德萊可斯坦莫结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1508年8月18日在英国素瑞金斯頓 武朋 坦斯享年36岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可哈洛 奧 馮 希爾。

nameMeanings.name: Evelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from an unrecorded Middle English female personal name Evelin(e), a double diminutive of Eve . Sometimes this surname was a variant of (or confused with) the surname Aveline, which is from the Middle English and Old French female personal name Avelin(e), either a double diminutive of ancient Germanic Ava, or of Old French and Middle English Avice (see Avis ).

variants.name: Eve
meanings: English (Essex) and Dutch: from the Middle English personal name Eve (from Latin Eva), of Biblical Hebrew origin (meaning ‘life’). According to the Book of Genesis, this was the name of the first woman, and in some cases the name may have been acquired by someone (invariably a man) who had played the part in a drama dealing with the Creation.

variants.name: Heavilin
meanings: Altered form of English Evelyn , with the addition of excrescent H-.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Evelyn was born on 10 January 1472, in Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, England, his father, William Evelyn, was 33 and his mother, Mrs William Evelyn, was 23. He married Alice Aylward on 18 August 1508, in Stanmore, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 18 August 1508, in Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Evelyn est né le 10 janvier 1472, à Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, William Evelyn, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs William Evelyn, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Alice Aylward le 18 août 1508, à Stanmore, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 18 août 1508, à Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Evelyn am 10. Januar 1472 in Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Evelyn 33 und seine Mutter Mrs William Evelyn 23. Er hat am 18. August 1508 in Stanmore, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Alice Aylward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 18. August 1508 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England und wurde in Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Evelyn è nato il il 10 gennaio 1472 nel Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, William Evelyn, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mrs William Evelyn, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Alice Aylward il 18 agosto 1508, nel Stanmore, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 agosto 1508, nel Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Evelynが1472年1月10日にイギリスミッドレセックスハーロー オン ス ヒルで生まれた時，父William Evelynは33歳，母Mrs William Evelynは23歳であった。1508年8月18日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックススタンモーでAlice Aylwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1508年8月18日にイギリススリーキングストン ウプオン サムスで36歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスハーロー オン ス ヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Evelyn(이)가 1472년 1월 10일 영국 미들레세스 해로  테 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Evelyn(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs William Evelyn(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1508년 8월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스탠모어에서 Alice Aylward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 8월 18일 영국 수리 킨그스턴 업 섬스에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 해로  테 힐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Evelyn nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1472, em Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Evelyn, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mrs William Evelyn, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Aylward em 18 de agosto de 1508, em Stanmore, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1508, em Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, England: харроу он т хилл, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Evelyn родился 10 января 1472 г. в местности харроу он т хилл, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Evelyn было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs William Evelyn, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Aylward 18 августа 1508 г. в местности станмор, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 18 августа 1508 г. в местности кингстон упон тамесь, сурри, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности харроу он т хилл, миддлесекс, Англия.

Se casó con Alice Aylward el 18 de agosto de 1508, en Stanmore, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1508, en Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Harrow on the Hill, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
